name: Fortive Corp
business: Fortive innovates essential technologies to keep the world safe and productive through two segments: Intelligent Operating Solutions and Advanced Healthcare Solutions. Intelligent Operating Solutions provides advanced instrumentation, software, and services for mission-critical workflows including maintenance, repair, measurement, condition monitoring, facility and asset lifecycle software, and connected worker safety. Advanced Healthcare Solutions supplies sterilization, instrument tracking, biomedical test tools, radiation detection, and clinical productivity software for healthcare providers.

exposures.sentence: Our Advanced Healthcare Solutions segment supplies critical workflow solutions enabling healthcare providers to deliver exceptional patient care more efficiently, including instrument sterilization solutions, instrument tracking, biomedical test tools, radiation detection and safety monitoring, and end-to-end clinical productivity software and solutions.
Our Advanced Healthcare Solutions segment supplies ... end-to-end clinical productivity software and solutions.

Sales growth in 2025 was driven by favorable pricing of 2.2%, including actions taken to mitigate unfavorable tariff impacts. Volume declined slightly, primarily in professional instrumentation during the first half of the year, partially offset by increases in gas detection products and facilities and asset lifecycle (FAL) software and services.

Disruptions in, or breaches in security of, our information technology systems, exfiltration of confidential or sensitive data, and other cyberattacks have adversely affected, and in the future could adversely affect, our business.
